name: Broccoli Sesame Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the broccoli and discard the leaves and toughest part of the stem.
2. Blanch the entire head in boiling water for one minute.
3. Rinse under cold water.
4. Break off florets and cut the remaining stem (peeled, if desired) into 2-inch pieces.
5. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees.
6. Pour olive oil onto a baking sheet and spread the broccoli pieces in one layer, turning to coat with olive oil.
7. Roast at 450 degrees for 5 minutes, turn the broccoli pieces over, and continue roasting until they begin to brown, about 5 more minutes.
8. Whisk together soy sauce, vinegar, and sesame oil. Stir in 3 tablespoons sesame seeds.
9. When the broccoli is done, transfer it to a bowl and pour the dressing over it, stirring gently to coat.
10. Sprinkle with the remaining tablespoon of sesame seeds.
11. Serve warm or at room temperature.
